prompt:
Use case: social ad thesis beat
Primary request: Transform chaos into a single clean operating line for a severe investor-style brand ad. Premium brutalist architecture, no people, no logos.
Scene/background: abstract brutalist concrete geometry suspended in a black void with one burnt orange line cutting through disorder
Subject: bounded execution
Action: beat 1 (0-2s) orange line slices through disorder; beat 2 (2-4s) all geometry snaps into a clean asymmetric composition
Camera: slow forward dolly with precise framing
Lighting/mood: authoritative, calm, expensive
Color palette: black, warm off-white concrete, burnt orange
Style/format: cinematic brutalist design film
Audio: pulse steadies, one clean mechanical hit
Text (verbatim): "BOUNDED BY DESIGN"
Constraints: no people; no logos; keep composition minimal
Avoid: soft corporate visuals, generic office architecture
